---
title: "See title at bottom of this file"
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
params:
  topic_01: "A humorous look at nonlinear fits"
  topic_02: "Constructing a spline from small pieces"
  topic_03: "B-splines"
  topic_04: "Placement and number of knots"
  topic_05: "Splines for linear and logistic regression"
  topic_06: "Your homework"
editor: source
---

## Topics to be covered

```{r}
# Preliminaries, if needed

# Keep this chunk, even if no code, so that
# params is populated from the yaml header.

# To print speaker notes, add
#   ?print-pdf&showNotes=separate-page 
#   to the end of the URL. Then open the
#   print dialog box (ctrl-P) and choose
#   Save as PDF for the printer. Other 
#   options, like Microsoft Print to PDF
#   do not seem to work.
```

-   What you will learn
    -   `r params$topic_01`
    -   `r params$topic_02`
    -   `r params$topic_03`
    -   `r params$topic_04`
    -   `r params$topic_05`
    -   `r params$topic_06`
    
## Web page on overfitting

-   Simon, Overfitting example using hurricane frequencies, PMean blog 2021-12-11, available in [html format][ref-simon-2021]

[ref-simon-2021]: http://pmean.com/posts/hurricane-frequencies/

{{< include _splines-01.qmd >}}

## Break #1

-   What you have learned
    -   `r params$topic_01`
-   What's coming next
    -   `r params$topic_02`

{{< include _splines-02.qmd >}}

## Break #2

-   What you have learned
    -   `r params$topic_02`
-   What's coming next
    -   `r params$topic_03`

{{< include _splines-03.qmd >}}

## Break #3

-   What you have learned
    -   `r params$topic_03`
-   What's coming next
    -   `r params$topic_04`

{{< include _splines-04.qmd >}}

## Break #4

-   What you have learned
    -   `r params$topic_04`
-   What's coming next
    -   `r params$topic_05`

{{< include _b2-06-05.qmd >}}

## Live demo, `r params$topic_05`

## Break #5

-   What you have learned
    -   `r params$topic_05`
-   What's coming next
    -   `r params$topic_06`

## Your homework

## Summary

-   What you have learned
    -   `r params$topic_01`
    -   `r params$topic_02`
    -   `r params$topic_03`
    -   `r params$topic_04`
    -   `r params$topic_05`
    -   `r params$topic_06`

```{=html}
<!---
      You have to put the title down 
      here to override the titles of
      all the include files.
--->
```

---
title: "simon-5502-06-slides"
---
